profile.name: FluxA
profile.bio:
Extensible Payment Primitives for the era of AI.
Catalyze the adoption of x402/AP2.

https://t.co/X8IrFB4vIS

tweets.text: Embedded & deferred payments reshape how agents transact. They turn payment from a separate financial step into an embedded capability within agent communication. #x402 inspired a movement — more financial innovation is coming.
Introducing Cowork: Claude Code for the rest of your work. Cowork lets you complete non-technical tasks much like how developers use Claude Code.

AI agents are becoming proactive. But proactivity without payment is just intention. At FluxA, we believe agent payment is what turns reasoning into execution — and expands the real capability boundary of agents.

Introducing FluxA Mandate: A risk-control–enhanced AP2 payment mandate service. Tell the agent your payment task, agent signs intent mandate, FluxA Mandate enforces secure execution, mitigates hallucinations and injection attacks.

You built the tools, agents are using them. Value is flowing... just not to you. Introducing FluxA Monetization. Turn any MCP and API server into a revenue stream. Paste your server URL, set prices per tool. Agents pays via x402.
Happy to join the @CoinbaseDev official x402 ecosystem page! Making x402 agent payments more secure and seamless.
Budget-controlled X402 access is now live on Qwen Code @Alibaba_Qwen. FluxA Agent Wallet gives you full budget control for your code agents.
Introducing FluxA AI Wallet — Agent spending, under control. Grant and revoke wallet access per agent, per-agent spending limits, per-x402 server payment policies, pay via MCP, APIs, and more.

scraped_pages.content: FluxA Monetize: Pricing configuration service for MCP proxy servers with FluxA payments. Built with Next.js. Enables monetization of proxy server services.

FluxA positions itself as 'The Extensible Payment Primitives for Agentic Commerce.' Vision: AI agents autonomously discover, purchase, and access services. Core problem: existing payment systems designed for humans, not AI. Two-sided approach: Supply side transforms internet resources into AI-discoverable commodities; Demand side enables autonomous AI payment with wallets, permissions, and risk control. Market context: x402, AP2, ACP protocols emerging. Strategy: Embedded Finance 2.0 - payments embedded in agent operations rather than user-initiated.

x402: Open internet-native payment standard built on HTTP 402. Key stats: 75.41M transactions, $24.24M volume, 94.06K buyers, 22K sellers. Five zeros: zero protocol fees, zero wait, zero friction, zero centralization, zero restrictions. Maintained by Coinbase Developer Platform.

FluxA Mandate: AP2 Payment Mandate Service with AI security + risk control. Four modules: 1) Agent Identity Graph (KYA compliance, fraud correlation), 2) Intent Mandate Semantic Layer (time limits, budgets, frequency caps, merchant restrictions), 3) Model Drift/AI Fraud Detection (prompt injection detection, red-teaming), 4) Task-chain Enforcement (signed Task DAG for audit trails). Addresses hallucination and context injection risks in agent payments.

FluxA: AI-native payment primitives infrastructure. Products: 1) FluxA AI Wallet - autonomous spending with controls, 2) FluxA Monetize - MCP/API monetization, 3) AEP2 Protocol - embedded payments for agent commerce. AEP2 uses 'Authorize first, settle later' with Groth16/BN254 ZK proofs on EVM for batch settlement. Modular architecture: Debit Wallet, Settlement Processor, KYC/KYB/KYA Providers, Dispute Processor. All peer-to-peer, self-custodied via smart contracts.

FluxA Documentation: Three areas - Wallet, AEP2 Protocol, Monetize. Protocol covers: payment mandates, debit wallet, ZK settlement processors, embedded payment integration, multiple transaction modes. Integration: Agent tools for init/payment/payout, MCP server support (local/remote), HTTP API endpoints for agent registration, x402 integration, payout management. User features: top-up, transfer, agent management, spend limits, auto-policies.

FluxA AI Wallet: Supervised spending for AI agents. Three-layer architecture: 1) Agent Identity (ID + JWT, no embedded secrets), 2) Authorization & Policies (manual approve, auto-approve with caps, time-bounded, per-request/daily/monthly limits), 3) Wallet & Transactions (single wallet multi-agent, real-time policy enforcement). Dashboard: agent registry, transaction history, policy management. Integrations: Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, LangChain via MCP.

web_searches.results: No specific funding information found for FluxA. Search returned different companies named Flux/Flux AI in other industries.
Confirmed FluxA in x402 ecosystem. AEP2 enables embedded payments in x402/A2A/MCP. Uses Groth16/BN254 ZK proofs for batch settlement on EVM. Official Coinbase x402 ecosystem partner.
No public GitHub repository found for FluxA/fluxapay.

product_suite: FluxA AI Wallet - Autonomous agent spending with human oversight
AEP2 Protocol - Agent Embedded Payment Protocol
